query: 易方达整体重仓股前10是什么

args.sql: WITH latest_size_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_size WHERE fund_company = '易方达'), latest_holding_date AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_date FROM fund_holding), efunds AS (SELECT DISTINCT fund_code FROM fund_size WHERE date = (SELECT max_date FROM latest_size_date) AND fund_company = '易方达') SELECT h.stock_code AS 股票代码, h.stock_name AS 股票名称, ROUND(SUM(h.holding_value), 2) AS 持有总市值 FROM fund_holding h INNER JOIN efunds e ON h.fund_code = e.fund_code WHERE h.date = (SELECT max_date FROM latest_holding_date) GROUP BY h.stock_code, h.stock_name ORDER BY 持有总市值 DESC LIMIT 10

plan.rationale: 从最新规模日期获取易方达旗下基金，在其最新持仓日期汇总持有市值，降序取前10

notes: 使用 fund_size 最新日期筛选易方达管理的基金代码
使用 fund_holding 最新日期作为持仓日期
持有市值合计以 fund_holding.holding_value 为准
从最新规模日期获取易方达旗下基金，在其最新持仓日期汇总持有市值，降序取前10
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。
